metadata.name: Close Out a Punch List Item

description: A subcontractor has fixed a paint defect. The quality inspector must verify the fix and close the punch list item.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the punch list item related to the 'Uneven paint finish' in the main lobby.

expected_outcome.value: The correct punch list item is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Visually inspect the corrected work to ensure it meets quality standards.

expected_outcome.value: The inspector confirms the paint finish is now acceptable.

nodes.task_description: Update the status of the punch list item to 'Completed' and add a closing comment.

expected_outcome.value: The punch list item is successfully closed out.
